name: @sliils/desktop
description: SliilS desktop app (Tauri 2 wrapping the web shell)

scripts.lint: node -e "console.log('desktop: no-op lint at M0 (Rust uses cargo fmt/clippy)')"

scripts.test: node -e "console.log('desktop: no JS tests; use cargo test in src-tauri/ for Rust-side tests')"
